label: Your home screen now fits how you garden
items: New gardeners get The Porch — a calm, guided welcome that leads with one clear “next best thing to do” instead of a wall of numbers.
Experienced gardeners get The Workbench — an operations console with a tabular status line, a telemetry-rich garden grid, and your insights in a side rail.
Switch between the two anytime with the view toggle on the greeting — the whole page recomposes to match.
One calmer AI card: your daily brief, care suggestions, head-gardener note and insights are now gathered into a single “From Rhozly” panel instead of four separate cards.
The daily brief now leads with advice and priorities rather than repeating counts you can already see at a glance.
